title: Fix dot fallback finding wrong symbols
body: Previously dotted lookup returned global variables sometimes, or variables from parent scopes. This patch makes sure that when a scope is specified, only that particular scope is searched for the symbol. Related to #1623 but does not fix that particular case unfortunately (that one is caused by starting the search with a cell scope, with fallback set to parent scope, rather than module scope, with fallback set to package/global scope).
